description: Research and compile a list of potential venues in Edinburgh with basic details
success_criterion: List of 3-5 venues with names, locations, capacities, and prices

description: Gather detailed information for the top-selected venue
success_criterion: Detailed data including pricing, amenities, and contact info for one venue

description: Create a promotional flyer using the selected venue's details
success_criterion: Completed flyer document in standard format
